title: TAYLOR CENTER - 211info
text: TAYLOR CENTER TAYLOR CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps people find and connect to community resources. Support can include obtaining a new ID, expunging records, setting up phone plans, and finding shelter or housing. Also connects individuals to mental health and addiction treatment, including Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT). When available, items like bikes, transportation, hygiene products, sleeping bags, tents, clothing, water, and food may be provided. 358 NE Marshall Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 7 days per week 8am-6:30pm (541) 585-0008 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 585-0008 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Mental Health Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TAYLOR CENTER
